hero.description: A modern trading journal focused on clarity, structure, and discipline. Local, fast, and built for prop traders who want to grow professionally.

features.label: Why Katsumii
features.headline: Professional structure with clear, focused workflows

spotlight.label: Feature Spotlight
spotlight.headline: Build conviction through calm, measurable execution
spotlight.description: The most important features are intentionally placed at the center: a fast trade workflow, crystal-clear prop rule visibility, and analytics that directly improve decision-making.
points: Log trades in seconds with screenshots, notes, and setup context.
Prop account limits always visible, including rule-break risk.
Analyze performance by setup, session, and mistakes to improve with precision.

cards.name: Account Clarity
cards.description: Prop and personal accounts in one view with clear goals, limits, and progress.

cards.name: Structured Journaling
cards.description: Capture trades with screenshots, notes, setup tags, and disciplined review logs.

cards.name: Actionable Analytics
cards.description: Track expectancy, R-multiples, setup quality, and consistency over time.

cards.name: Private by Design
cards.description: No login and no cloud dependency. Your trading data stays local.

dashboard.label: Dashboard Analytics
dashboard.headline: Measure your edge.
dashboard.description: The dashboard displays balance, PnL, rule status, and setup quality in a clear analytics flow.

dashboardSteps.title: Account and PnL at a glance
dashboardSteps.description: Instantly see your balance, total PnL, and active accounts.

dashboardSteps.title: Rule-focused monitoring
dashboardSteps.description: Keep track of limits and risk status before rules are violated.

dashboardSteps.title: Setup quality tracking
dashboardSteps.description: Compare setups and quickly identify what truly drives your edge.

calendar.label: Trading Calendar
calendar.headline: Plan with clarity.
calendar.description: The calendar makes trading days, daily PnL, and monthly patterns immediately visible, making reviews faster and more precise.

calendarSteps.title: Daily performance overview
calendarSteps.description: Each day instantly shows profit, loss, and activity within the monthly view.

calendarSteps.title: Pattern recognition
calendarSteps.description: Identify weekly patterns and recurring mistakes in your timing.

calendarSteps.title: Review-ready history
calendarSteps.description: Use the calendar history for structured weekly and monthly reviews.

pricing.label: License
pricing.headline: One-time payment. Long-term edge.
pricing.description: No subscription and no cloud dependency. Your data stays local and under your control.

light.name: Light
light.description: For clean journaling with essential analytics.

professional.name: Professional
professional.description: For serious traders who optimize process and performance.

cta.headline: Ready to build your edge with discipline?
cta.description: Start with the full version or test the demo first. Same mindset, same clean workflow.

footer.description: Built for traders who value clarity, respect rules, and want to systematically improve their performance.

support.label: Support
support.description: Questions about the license, demo, or workflow? We're happy to help.
